title: Check if Every Row and Column Contains All Numbers
titleCn: 检查是否每一行每一列都包含全部整数

testcases.input: matrix = [[1,2,3],[3,1,2],[2,3,1]] Output: true Explanation: In this case, n = 3, and every row and column contains the numbers 1, 2, and 3. Hence, we return true.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: In this case, n = 3, and every row and column contains the numbers 1, 2, and 3. Hence, we return true.

testcases.input: matrix = [[1,1,1],[1,2,3],[1,2,3]] Output: false Explanation: In this case, n = 3, but the first row and the first column do not contain the numbers 2 or 3. Hence, we return false.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: In this case, n = 3, but the first row and the first column do not contain the numbers 2 or 3. Hence, we return false.
